pr.title: Draft: SOTA+ TTT + RoPE50K + EMA + Curriculum (pending H100 run)

output.summary: Builds on PR198 stack by adding RoPE50K, LAWA-EMA, context curriculum, and val-set SGD TTT to refine weights before final scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Full-model SGD test-time training runs one epoch on the validation shard before evaluation.
techniques: RoPE base 50K for smoother long-range interpolation
Context curriculum followed by val-set SGD TTT adaptation
